title: chat_update: validate add_members and update_member_roles IDs for empty string
description: In chat.rs chat_update, the add_members and update_member_roles closures use m.id and u.id without validating for empty string. Space.rs has the same operations with empty-string guards (added in round 3). For consistency, chat.rs needs the same guards. Fix: add if m.id.is_empty() / if u.id.is_empty() checks that return ClientError::InvalidArgument.
